Traditionally, Hilliardiella nudicaulis has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. Hilliardiella nudicaulis is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to relieve respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
